chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5831 - هِبَةُ اَلرَّجُلِ لِزَوْجَتِهِ تَزِيدُ فِي عِفَّتِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5831 - The Prophet (sw) said; "A man's gift to his wife increases her chastity."
(strengthens her sense of loyalty and affinity for her husband)
